complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Setup Content Management System with Markdown
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the Content Management System implementation into subtasks focusing on: 1) Core content parsing utilities, 2) Content type interfaces and models, 3) Dynamic routing implementation, 4) MDX component development, and 5) Content caching and optimization strategies.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves multiple technical components including markdown parsing, TypeScript interfaces, dynamic routing, and caching strategies. It's already in progress with some completed items, but still requires significant work on MDX components, syntax highlighting, and Git-based workflows.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide the Hero Section development into subtasks covering: 1) Core layout and responsive design, 2) Animation implementation with Framer Motion, 3) Content strategy for technical audience, and 4) Performance optimization and accessibility compliance.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: While primarily a frontend task, it involves complex animations, TypeWriter effects, and particle visualizations. The additional requirements for targeting technical hiring managers and implementing A/B testing increase its complexity. The task is already in progress but needs further refinement.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the Technical Infrastructure Showcase implementation into subtasks covering: 1) Architecture diagram design with React Flow, 2) Infrastructure component development, 3) Status indicator system and API integration, 4) Interactive elements and tooltips, and 5) Responsive design and fallback mechanisms.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task requires complex visualization of infrastructure using React Flow, real-time status indicators, API integration, and interactive elements. It combines both frontend visualization challenges and backend API integration, making it technically complex.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide the Projects Portfolio section into subtasks focusing on: 1) Project card component design and implementation, 2) GitHub API integration and caching, 3) Detailed project page templates, 4) Filtering, sorting, and search functionality, and 5) Technical documentation integration for each project.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves creating complex UI components, GitHub API integration, image carousels, and search functionality. The additional requirements for technical documentation and architecture diagrams increase its complexity. It's a core section of the portfolio that needs to demonstrate technical competencies.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the About Section development into subtasks covering: 1) Professional narrative and content strategy, 2) Skills visualization and technical philosophy components, and 3) Work style and preferences presentation.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: While this task involves content creation and some visualization components, it's less technically complex than others. The challenge lies in effectively communicating professional background, technical philosophy, and work preferences in an authentic way.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide the Contact and Availability Section into subtasks focusing on: 1) Contact form design and validation, 2) Serverless function implementation for form submission, and 3) Availability indicator and GitHub profile integration.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves form validation, serverless functions for email sending, and GitHub integration. It requires both frontend and backend work, including security considerations like rate limiting and anti-spam measures.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the SEO and Analytics implementation into subtasks covering: 1) SEO component and metadata setup, 2) Structured data implementation for various content types, 3) Analytics configuration with consent management, and 4) Performance monitoring and technical keyword optimization.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves multiple technical aspects including SEO configuration, structured data implementation, analytics setup, and performance monitoring. It requires understanding of schema.org, JSON-LD, and various SEO best practices for technical content.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Implement Tool Demonstrations and Live Service Integration
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide the Tool Demonstrations implementation into subtasks focusing on: 1) Tool showcase section design, 2) API integration for status checks, 3) Interactive demo components with authentication, and 4) Service discovery integration and documentation linking.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves complex integration with live services, API calls, authentication, and interactive demos. The service discovery system and fallback mechanisms add significant complexity. It requires both frontend and backend expertise.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the Performance Optimization implementation into subtasks covering: 1) Code splitting and dynamic imports, 2) Image and font optimization, 3) Caching strategies and bundle optimization, and 4) Service worker implementation and third-party script optimization.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves advanced performance optimization techniques across multiple areas including code splitting, caching, bundle optimization, and service workers. It requires deep understanding of Next.js performance features and web performance best practices.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide the Accessibility Compliance implementation into subtasks focusing on: 1) Semantic HTML and ARIA attributes, 2) Keyboard navigation and focus management, 3) Color contrast and screen reader compatibility, and 4) Technical documentation accessibility.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task requires comprehensive knowledge of WCAG 2.1 standards and implementation across the entire application. It involves semantic HTML, ARIA attributes, keyboard navigation, and testing with assistive technologies. The technical documentation accessibility adds complexity.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the CI/CD Pipeline setup into subtasks covering: 1) GitHub Actions workflow configuration, 2) Containerization with Docker, 3) Kubernetes deployment manifests, 4) Secret management and environment configuration, and 5) Monitoring and notification integration.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves complex DevOps processes including CI/CD configuration, containerization, Kubernetes deployment, and secret management. It requires expertise in GitHub Actions, Docker, Kubernetes, and infrastructure automation.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide the Monitoring and Analytics Dashboard implementation into subtasks focusing on: 1) Prometheus and Grafana setup, 2) Custom Next.js metrics implementation, 3) User analytics dashboard development, and 4) Documentation usage analytics and service health integration.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves setting up complex monitoring systems with Prometheus and Grafana, implementing custom metrics, creating dashboards, and integrating with analytics. It requires expertise in monitoring, metrics collection, and data visualization.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the Final Testing, Documentation, and Launch process into subtasks covering: 1) Comprehensive cross-browser and device testing, 2) Documentation creation and maintenance planning, 3) Pre-launch configuration and security review, 4) Launch preparation and announcement, and 5) Post-launch monitoring and optimization.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves multiple aspects of quality assurance, documentation, and deployment preparation. It requires comprehensive testing across browsers and devices, documentation creation, security review, and launch preparation. The dependencies on all other tasks increase its complexity.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Implement GitHub API Integration for Project Showcase
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide the GitHub API Integration implementation into subtasks focusing on: 1) API client setup with authentication and caching, 2) Repository data fetching services, 3) Repository display components and visualizations, and 4) Detailed project page templates and automatic data refresh.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves complex API integration with GitHub, data fetching, caching strategies, and visualization components. It requires handling authentication, rate limiting, and creating interactive repository displays with statistics and charts.
